input.command:
for d in 2025/12/28 2025/12/29; do
  f="articles/$d/articles.jsonl"; [ -f "$f" ] || continue
  echo "=== $d ($(wc -l < $f)) ==="
  cat "$f" | python3 -c "
import sys,json,re
kw=re.compile(r'new year.s eve|charlotte|interim president|venezuela|zelensky.*(defen|reshuff)|ume?rov|measles|oreshnik|tyson fury|brisbane|nepal|portugal.*(president|election)|bulgaria.*president|defence minister',re.I)
seen=set()
for line in sys.stdin:
    try: a=json.loads(line)
    except: continue
    t=a.get('title','')
    if kw.search(t) and t not in seen:
        seen.add(t); print(' -',(a.get('source','?'))[:16],'|',t[:120])
" | head -20
done

## DAY 6 (2025-12-29)
- Nepal: "former rapper" + Gen-Z alliance running for PM in upcoming elections (q758920 resolves Mar 27). Identify the candidate later; traditional leaders (Oli/Deuba/Dahal) may be challenged. Revisit closer to date.

- No Charlotte NYE attack yet (NYE is Dec 31).
